title: Listening to you | Greg Smith
meta_description: The most important thing for any politician to do is listen. As your Conservative Member of Parliament for the new Mid Buckinghamshire constituency, I want to hear what you think, either locally or when it comes to national policies.
headings: h3: Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
text_excerpt: Listening to you | Greg Smith Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact Listening to you Tweet The most important thing for any politician to do is listen. As your Conservative Member of Parliament for the new Mid Buckinghamshire constituency, I want to hear what you think, either locally or when it comes to national policies. This survey is part of the pledge I made to ensure I am accessible, contactable, and visible across the market towns, villages and hamlets of the 336 square miles of the Mid Buckinghamshire constituency. My mission will always be to serve as Mid Buckinghamshire's champion in Westminster, not Westminster's voice in Mid Buckinghamshire. Please do complete the survey here and let me know what matters most to you and your family. I will read every submission personally and ensure your views are heard clearly. I look forward to hearing from you, Greg Smith MP Bluetree_survey Current National Issues Get involved Your details Leave this field blank What is the most important question for you and your family right now? In order to make this survey representative, how did you vote in the 2024 General Election?
